name: orchestra-marketplace
description: Agent skills for diagnosing, fixing, triaging, and authoring Orchestra data pipelines, plus dbt Slim CI setup, Snowflake quality tests, and best-practice account reviews.

plugins.name: orchestra
plugins.description: Skills for working with Orchestra data pipelines — diagnose and fix failed runs, triage with a merge gate, author pipeline YAML, set up dbt Slim CI, run Snowflake data-quality tests, and review a workspace against best practices. MCP-first.
